_doc: Mission order → blog post URLs from missiondayfoshan.blogspot.com. Titles use the long descriptive form from the blog navigation page (任务选点 section). 'date' is parsed YYYY-MM from the post URL. JP falls back to EN at render time. Posts that cover two adjacent missions are duplicated across both entries.

1.title_zh: 【秀丽湖畔】这座城郊的民国公园,刻录着佛山武术与雷锋榜样的历史
1.title_en: "Xiuli Lake" — Where a City Walk Becomes a Story

3.title_zh: 【快子挥春】从几乎拆迁到佛山年味地标,百年老街快子路骑楼街几经沉浮
3.title_en: "Fai Zi Fai Chun" — From Near Demolition to Foshan's Most Festive Street

4.title_zh: 【洛水流芳】【祖庙圣域】几百米路藏尽千年史,古河填出来的老城中轴刻满了佛山城建轨迹
4.title_en: "Echoes of Luoshui" / "Sacred Realm of Zumiao" — Where a River Became a Road: A Thousand Years of Foshan in One Walk

5.title_zh: 【洛水流芳】【祖庙圣域】几百米路藏尽千年史,古河填出来的老城中轴刻满了佛山城建轨迹
5.title_en: "Echoes of Luoshui" / "Sacred Realm of Zumiao" — Where a River Became a Road: A Thousand Years of Foshan in One Walk

7.title_zh: 【佛山初地】未有佛山,先有塔坡——“佛山”称谓的由来
7.title_en: "Foshan's Origins" — Before Foshan, There Was Tapo — The Origin of the Name "Foshan"

9.title_zh: 【行通济】这个不用5分钟即可做完的MD任务地点,每年元宵竟有百万人走过
9.title_en: "Walking Tongji" — A 5-Minute Mission with 400 Years of History (and One Million Participants)

16.title_zh: 【陶都艺苑】【古灶薪传】做完这两个任务,佛山几千年制陶史就看完了
